/usr/bin/ar qc libpostgis.a liblwgeom/CMakeFiles/liblwgeom.dir/bytebuffer.c.o liblwgeom/CMakeFiles/liblwgeom.dir/effectivearea.c.o liblwgeom/CMakeFiles/liblwgeom.dir/gbox.c.o /usr/bin/ranlib libpostgis.a
